name: archon-qwen-autopilot
description: Archon Autopilot — a human-gated accounts-payable agent. Qwen function-calling (Alibaba Cloud Model Studio / DashScope) proposes ONE action per invoice; nothing executes until a human approves the exact args (human-in-the-loop gate). Grounded on a persistent pgvector MemoryAgent foundation. Live Qwen wired, verified offline via deterministic Fakes. Track-4 (Autopilot Agent) entry; layers on the Track-1 Archon MemoryAgent.

scripts.test:unit: node --import tsx --test tests/unit/embeddings.test.ts tests/unit/memory.test.ts tests/unit/normalize.test.ts tests/unit/validate.test.ts tests/unit/tools.test.ts tests/unit/decider.test.ts tests/unit/workflow.test.ts tests/unit/server.test.ts
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/unit/embeddings.test.ts tests/unit/memory.test.ts tests/unit/normalize.test.ts tests/unit/validate.test.ts tests/unit/tools.test.ts tests/unit/decider.test.ts tests/unit/workflow.test.ts tests/unit/server.test.ts tests/integration/workflow-http.test.ts tests/integration/pgvector-store.test.ts
